transcripts.title: V13 — Custom Actions
transcripts.description: Verify custom feed and photograph actions with grammar extension

commands.output:
Family Zoo
By Sharpee Tutorial

Type HELP for instructions.

Main Path

A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo. Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside the path. To the east, the petting zoo. To the west, the aviary. A staff gate blocks the path to the south. The gift shop is also to the west, past the aviary. The entrance is back to the north.

You can see staff gate, direction signs, flower beds, souvenir penny, park bench, lunchbox, zookeeper here.
commands.comment: Go to petting zoo and get feed

commands.output:
Petting Zoo

A cheerful open-air enclosure filled with friendly animals. Pygmy goats trot around nibbling at visitors' shoelaces, while a pair of fluffy rabbits hop lazily near a hay bale. A feed dispenser is mounted on a post. An info plaque is posted by the gate. The main path is back to the west.

You can see pygmy goats, hay bale, rabbits, info plaque, bag of animal feed, feed dispenser here.
commands.comment: V13 teaches: Story-specific actions, grammar extension, language messages

commands.output: You scatter some feed on the ground. The pygmy goats rush over, bleating excitedly, and devour the corn and pellets in seconds. The smallest goat looks up at you with big grateful eyes.
You've already fed them. They look contentedly full.
commands.comment: Try to feed again — already fed

commands.output: You don't have a camera. There's one in the gift shop.
commands.comment: Try to photograph without a camera — blocked

commands.output:
Main Path

A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo. Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside the path. To the east, the petting zoo. To the west, the aviary. A staff gate blocks the path to the south. The gift shop is also to the west, past the aviary. The entrance is back to the north.

You can see staff gate, direction signs, flower beds, souvenir penny, park bench, lunchbox here.
commands.comment: Go get the camera from the gift shop

commands.output:
Aviary

You step inside a soaring mesh dome. Brilliantly colored parrots chatter from rope perches, and a toucan eyes you curiously from a branch overhead. A small waterfall splashes into a stone basin. An info plaque hangs near the entrance. The gift shop is to the west. The main path is back to the east.

You can see toucan, parrots, waterfall, rope perches, aviary plaque, parrot here.

Gift Shop

A small zoo gift shop crammed with stuffed animals and postcards. A large souvenir penny press machine stands near the door. A disposable camera sits on the counter. The aviary is back to the east.

You can see stuffed animals, postcards, disposable camera, souvenir press here.
Click! You snap a photo of postcards. That one's going on the fridge.

Aviary

You step inside a soaring mesh dome. Brilliantly colored parrots chatter from rope perches, and a toucan eyes you curiously from a branch overhead. A small waterfall splashes into a stone basin. An info plaque hangs near the entrance. The gift shop is to the west. The main path is back to the east.

You can see toucan, parrots, waterfall, rope perches, aviary plaque, parrot here.
commands.comment: Go to aviary and photograph the toucan

commands.output: Click! You snap a photo of toucan. That one's going on the fridge.
